name: ZenHR
description: Cloud-based Human Resources Management System designed to automate attendance tracking, payroll calculation, shift rosters, and more. Learn more about ZenHR

reviews.review_title: As a current user of ZenHR
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: As a new employee in our company, I can see who my colleagues as well as the hierarchy. There is also calendar to track the holidays. It is so helpful for me. Especially I have all my important documents stored in the system.
reviews.review_pros: It is so easy to use and more convenient, you can install the app in your phone and even log in to your laptop. It can track where you time in and time out. It is accurately recorded. You can request documents you need and also you can access it any time in the system.
reviews.review_cons: In my 3 months of using ZenHR. I think none, I didn’t encounter any issues about it.

reviews.review_description: very good App. , i hope it continue more and more with the same line and improve there technology to make it more easy for all employees and Hr Management
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use it means very useful for on site or remotely jobs for requests leave or vacation and till now it secured and making updates always
reviews.review_cons: payroll section important but less important than other and also documents section it should uploaded our contracts every year

reviews.review_description: I use ZenHR to check in and out at work and occasionally request time off. I find it helpful and user friendly enough to use and definitely is a much better option compared to the fingerprint check in/out that some companies still adopt.
reviews.review_pros: ZenHR is a very helpful tool for employees to manage their timesheets, vacations, and other requests, and at the same times for employers to track their employees' schedules whether to check attendance or to issue payroll. The software has a lot of features and the customer support is very responsive and helpful.
reviews.review_cons: Some thing I dislike in the ZenHR software is the geolocation bug in the clock-in and clock-out features: Sometimes the location is stuck and checking in/out at the office would appear like doing so from another location. Also, I don't like that employees are not able to check their total checked in hours during the month, which can be helpful to manage their hours and schedules overall.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: the organization of the website and how easy it is to manage, as well as the efficiency it produces for requests like sick leaves and personal days.
reviews.review_cons: the app doesn't always register punch in times immediately, and it used to register punch ins and punch outs opposite of each other

reviews.review_title: Comprehensive and User-Friendly HR Solution with Minor Improvements Needed
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with ZenHR has been positive. It offers a user-friendly interface, comprehensive HR features, and helpful automation. It's especially strong in compliance with local labor laws. However, it could improve on integration options and mobile app functionality. Despite these, the customer support is responsive and resolves issues quickly. Overall, it's a reliable HR solution.
reviews.review_pros: User-friendly interface that’s easy to navigate. Comprehensive HR features covering payroll, attendance, and performance management. Automation of manual tasks saves time and reduces errors. Compliance with local labor laws, tailored for MENA markets. Employee self-service for leave requests and payslips. Cloud-based, enabling access from anywhere.
reviews.review_cons: Limited integrations with other software, which may require manual data entry or additional workarounds. Customization limitations in some features, especially for businesses with very specific needs. Occasional bugs or glitches reported, though usually resolved quickly by support. Learning curve for first-time users, especially when setting up more advanced features. Mobile app functionality can be limited compared to the desktop version.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far it’s been a really nice and pleasant experience, using the app made life so much easier, would definitely recommend it to everyone.
reviews.review_pros: It’s such a great management site for employees, I loved that I can easily monitor when i’ve logged in and for how long for any day. Additionally, requesting time off has never been easier, and again monitoring my remaining days off and the documents i’ve received from HR is great.
reviews.review_cons: Only sometimes it could glitch out and not monitor the actual hours i’ve worked, and still shows me as logged in, even though i’ve logged out, or logs me out by itself. However since it monitors everything so it’s not an issue, as on the app it still shows that i’ve logged in at the time i did.

reviews.review_title: Tarek Honset Review About Zen HR
reviews.review_description: a solid 9/10 so far from what i have experienced , i do think i need to see more details or if it has an Arabic language that would be better for me
reviews.review_pros: i love how easy it looks how can i navigate through it without a problem i really do love the flow,the steps its all easy
reviews.review_cons: maybe i dont like how its not really updated that fast or sometimes the request might take sometime to get processed

reviews.review_title: Efficient HR Solution with Room for Customization
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with ZenHR has been very positive. The platform offers a user-friendly interface and a comprehensive set of tools that make managing HR tasks more efficient. It simplifies processes like payroll, employee onboarding, and performance tracking, which has been incredibly valuable for our team. I also appreciate the customer support, which has been responsive and helpful. However, there are a few areas where I see potential for improvement. For instance, expanding the customization options for reports and workflows would be a great enhancement, as different organizations may have unique needs. Nonetheless, ZenHR is a strong, reliable solution, and I’ve seen firsthand how it helps streamline HR operations
reviews.review_pros: is its innovative approach to simplifying and automating HR processes. The platform's user-friendly interface, combined with its comprehensive range of features, shows a clear understanding of the challenges HR departments face, especially in growing businesses. I also appreciate the company's commitment to creating a positive workplace culture, both for its clients and its own team, which reflects in ZenHR's focus on enhancing employee
reviews.review_cons: One aspect I found could be improved in ZenHR is the customization options for certain features. While the platform is generally intuitive and efficient, offering more flexibility in tailoring specific tools to the unique needs of different businesses could enhance the user experience even further. That said, I appreciate that ZenHR is constantly evolving, and I’m confident these areas will continue to improve with time

reviews.review_pros: I like everything easy to fetch your annual leave, sick leave your attendance, easy to clock IN Clock out, easily find out your colleagues leaves while you work on remotely, easy to fetch your account details information including your wages and much more.
reviews.review_cons: While Clock IN and Clock Out i least like to wait for the accurate location before clock IN and out.

reviews.review_pros: Dashboard, creative menus, mobile app & huge HR contents
reviews.review_cons: - evaluation cycles - 104 error repeatedly - emails integration with client domain, by default goes to spam list

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Amazing I love it, It all in one application for the companies and the employees
reviews.review_pros: The application is well organized that helps the accessibility in it
reviews.review_cons: I don't like the location tracking, it's kinda uncomfortable

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: i have liked it as it is unique and simple and easy to use i always check my check in and out history and my vacations and it helps you connect to the managers easily
reviews.review_pros: that it is simple and not over complicated and straight forward and has all the information needed for an employee
reviews.review_cons: that sometimes it freeze on the transactions tab

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It was a good experience so far; I found all the data I need and it was easy to navigate
reviews.review_pros: Zenhr is clear and accessible to all the data I need
reviews.review_cons: I am new at the program, so I haven't found anything I like least about it

reviews.review_pros: the interface is simple and easy to use
reviews.review_cons: some of the functions won't work on android if i do clock in in by the app map, and then clock in by fingerprint it will clock me out

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: i found it funny and easy to use an HR programe
reviews.review_pros: Flexibility for everything and ease of use
reviews.review_cons: some features I found complicated such as the total number of vacations and the requested time.

reviews.review_title: ZenHR is your solution when dealing with employees and payroll.
reviews.review_description: More options needs to there in reflecting data in diagrams.
reviews.review_pros: The technical support is great, update is wonderful, the features are great.
reviews.review_cons: They need to perform more updates in relation to diagrams and in reflecting KPI's progress with diagrams.

reviews.review_title: the right software in the right place
reviews.review_description: it was so primitive at first but I am amazed by the bprogress and the organization it has every time I open it. I highly recommend it
reviews.review_pros: the software is very well organized, it is still under construction in our company, but as soon as it is complete....I guess it will contain allll the informatoin any employee may need.
reviews.review_cons: It took the company to much time to finih the basics of the employees information

reviews.review_description: ZenHR gives us a core and a direct to the point HR services. If anyone is interested they can sign into their website and ask for a free trial period.
reviews.review_pros: 1. It’s a clouds based and price efficient 2.localized to each country of MENA labor law. 3.easy to use 4.customized payroll module 5.on boarding /off boarding -finger print integration 6.performance /appraisal & evaluation. 7.mob app 8.adorable customer service during the implementing and after going live.
reviews.review_cons: My only concern was the training module and they are currently working on it and according to their road map it must be active by the beginning of 2019.

reviews.review_title: Best HR System in the MENA Region
reviews.review_pros: The product is very intuitive, its very easy to use with straight-forward actions, and has a very good UI that isn't confusing. All features are easy to get to and you can use any of the features without much of a hassle
reviews.review_cons: The notifications/emailing system is good, however it is inconsistent and sometimes lags or doesn't send the notification

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Makes it easier to communicate with managers and settle leave situations without the awkwardness of it.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use and efficiency and practicality.
reviews.review_cons: Could be a bit faster in terms of processing time, maybe have the option to type in the time manually.

reviews.review_description: It is pleasant to use and I really like that it does not look intimidating. However I am not in the administration of it so I speak only as a user.
reviews.review_pros: ZenHR is extremely user friendly and has a pleasing visual interface. I have that it does not look cramped up and help features are available. ZenHR also makes the system with many running parts look seamless.
reviews.review_cons: I believe that there are features that are not available. I do not see any integrations and as a supervisor of a supervisor, I should be able to see all teams' profiles and related information.

reviews.review_description: brilliant
reviews.review_pros: easy access and tracking for payroll and vacations.
reviews.review_cons: so far nothing, easy access and understanding.

reviews.review_description: It is very nice and helpful and comprehensive.
reviews.review_pros: What I really like about the software that it ease our job on dailiy basis. Before we wait for our managers to sign up the HR letters but now it is very comprehensive for them to approve our letter.
reviews.review_cons: To be honest currently I dont have anything to say about this.
